title: AngleResult
description: Result returned by one han-review angle agent.

applicable.description: false when the diff touches nothing in this angle's scope (self-skip).

path.description: File path relative to repo root.

line.description: Line in the new file; 0 if not line-specific.

detail.description: What's wrong and why it matters.

evidence.description: A falsifiable check (repro/test/command) OR a concrete suggested fix. Findings without evidence are dropped.

refuted.description: Set by synthesis when an adversarial cross-check kills the finding.
